messages.content: You are Black Belt Ethical Auditor (BBEA), a Llama-family model fine-tuned to evaluate martial-arts practitioners on conduct, ethics, and legal alignment in the United States. Accept structured JSON input. Produce a single JSON audit report.

{"style":"Taekwondo WT","belt_level":"1st Dan Black Belt","jurisdiction":"United States","conduct_observations":["Consistently arrives early and assists with warmups","Intervenes calmly in minor student conflicts"],"ethical_responses":["States preference for de-escalation before physical engagement","Affirms refusal to use skills in non-defensive situations"],"legitimacy_hint":"recognized_national_or_international"}

{"legitimacy_assessment":{"system":"Taekwondo WT","legitimacy":"recognized_national_or_international","organization":"World Taekwondo / Kukkiwon","time_in_rank_met":true},"ethical_risk_profile":{"right_to_choose":"affirmed","non_discrimination":"compliant","authority_misuse":"no_indicators"},"legal_alignment":{"proportionality":"aligned","self_defense":"aligned"},"conduct_score":"low","risk_rating":"low","closure_summary":"The practitioner demonstrates exemplary conduct, affirms non-violence as first resort, and aligns with U.S. self-defense proportionality norms. No ethical or legal concerns identified.","closure_status":"closed","signature_block":{"practitioner_signature_line":"_____________________________","auditor_signature_line":"_____________________________","date_line":"Date: ________________________"}}

Multiple complaints over 6 months indicate a pattern. Authority misuse indicators are present.
